2604.25551.title: On Halting vs Converging in Recurrent Graph Neural Networks
2604.25551.paper_summary: Recurrent Graph Neural Networks (RGNNs) extend standard GNNs by iterating message-passing until some stopping condition is met. Various RGNN models have been proposed in the literature. In this paper, we study three such models: converging RGNNs, where all vertex representations must stabilise; output-converging RGNNs, where only the output classifications must stabilise; and halting RGNNs, where a per-vertex halting classifier determines when to stop. We establish expressiveness relationships between these models: over undirected graphs, converging RGNNs are equally expressive as graded-bisimulation-invariant halting RGNNs, while output-converging RGNNs are at least as expressive. Combined with prior results on halting RGNNs, this shows that, relative to the classifiers expressible in monadic second-order logic (MSO), converging RGNNs express exactly the graded modal $μ$-calculus ($μ$GML), and output-converging RGNNs express at least $μ$GML. These results hold even when restricting to ReLU networks with sum aggregation. The main technical challenge is simulating halting RGNNs by converging ones: without a global halting classifier, vertices may locally decide to halt at different times, causing desynchronisation. We develop a "traffic-light" protocol that enables vertices to coordinate despite this asynchrony. Our results answer an open question from Bollen et al. (2025) and show that the RGNN model of Pflueger et al. (2024) retains full $μ$GML expressiveness even when convergence is guaranteed.
2604.25551.paper_summary_zh: 重複圖神經網絡（RGNNs）通過迭代消息傳遞來擴展標準的GNNs，直到滿足某些停止條件。文獻中提出了各種RGNN模型。在本文中，我們研究了三種此類模型：收斂RGNNs，其中所有頂點表示必須穩定；輸出收斂RGNNs，其中只有輸出分類必須穩定；以及停止RGNNs，其中每個頂點的停止分類器決定何時停止。我們建立了這些模型之間的表達關係：在無向圖上，收斂RGNNs的表達能力與分級雙模不變的停止RGNNs相同，而輸出收斂RGNNs至少具有同樣的表達能力。結合之前對停止RGNNs的結果，這顯示，相對於在單子二階邏輯（MSO）中可表達的分類器，收斂RGNNs精確表達分級模態$μ$-演算（$μ$GML），而輸出收斂RGNNs至少表達$μ$GML。這些結果即使在限制為具有和聚合的ReLU網絡時也成立。主要的技術挑戰是用收斂的RGNNs來模擬停止的RGNNs：在沒有全局停止分類器的情況下，頂點可能會在不同的時間局部決定停止，導致不同步。我們開發了一種“交通燈”協議，使頂點能夠儘管存在這種非同步性而協調。我們的結果回答了Bollen等人（2025）的一個未解問題，並顯示Pflueger等人（2024）的RGNN模型即使在保證收斂的情況下也保留了完整的$μ$GML表達能力。
2604.25551.author: Jeroen Bollen et.al.
